description:
In this video, I share my shocking experience after my Skoda Octavia caught fire and how ICICI Lombard completely failed me during the insurance claim process.

You'll get to see the complete car fire insurance claim journey, the major challenges, delays, unprofessional behavior, and potential fraud-like activities I faced with ICICI Lombard General Insurance.

If you're considering insuring your car with ICICI Lombard — WATCH THIS FIRST!

🚫 I strongly advise against choosing ICICI Lombard for car insurance based on my real-life experience.

✅ This video includes:
• What happened to my Skoda Octavia
• Step-by-step claim process with ICICI
• Hidden issues and mismanagement
• Why I believe they are not trustworthy
• Important tips for choosing the right insurance company

🎥 Subscribe for more honest car-related content, reviews, vlogs, and travel experiences: @XploreWithUs

📢 Have you faced similar issues with ICICI or other insurers? Share your experience in the comments!

Disclaimer:
This video is based solely on my personal experience and is intended for informational purposes only. It is not meant to defame, discredit, or harm the reputation of any individual, company, or organization. All opinions expressed are my own and should be viewed in that context

#ICICILombard #CarInsuranceFraud #SkodaOctaviaFire #InsuranceClaimExposed #XploreWithUs #CarFire #WorstInsuranceExperience #CarVlogIndia #CarBurned #ICICIExperience #HonestReview #ExposingInsuranceFraud

comments.text: I am also facing the issue that there is a mild scratch on my backside car and which is done by a bike who just did a sudden break and it got my scratches or tail break, so I applied for the ICICI Lombard claim, but after that they are applied for approval. They call me for what is happening. I told each and everything that yesterday night I just Got a call from IC not that person ICIC person, they just give me a call of Fraud call like are you going? Can you give me a drive for Visakhapatnam airport and I will pay you so my car is in service centre because of this incident and I am doing my Other services car like washing another things. I just give my car on that so I asked that where you got my number so he said that your number is got from some other other candidates and you are doing some commercial like you are doing rent. You’re giving rental cars like that, so I said no, I am not giving any Rental to the car, so maybe a wrong number. He’s speaking in Hindi that time and he’s not speaking properly. English or Hindi is saying that I want to go Visakhapatnam airport. After that. I said okay if you want, I think somebody is doing prank with me and I say okay, just pay me the 5000 so he saying just 5000 is okay or you don’t want more money, why I said okay give me 7000 he said 7000 is okay so I said okay you pay tollgate and other things so he said okay, I will I want to pay you in advance, so I said okay, you can pay me in advance. He said okay just give me your number. I don’t give my number even I just cut the call. I said I think this was a fraudulent call, some fake call, so I just close. I just checked my Bank balance. Also, that some cutting is done from my or any fraudulent activities done by my bank account, so by God, Grace, nothing is happened on morning today. I got a call from ICICI Lombard. He say that we give a call yesterday night that you are. You are using your car for commercial usage. Even I don’t understand my car is new and my car is always in parking lot or if you are going for half an hour or one hour or we are going for a day outing. We are just going. We have a CCTV footage. We have approved that our car is not going our usage for a commercial usage, they just give a call or a fraudulent call, and they said that this is a commercial use, so we are not providing the claim And we are disclosing your claim this type of fraudulent activity done by icici lombard

comments.text:
आपके क्लेम को बहुत ज्यादा गलत तरीके से deal किया गया है, लेकिन हमारे देश मे यह तरीका बहुत ही आम है।

1, बीमा कानून के अनुसार इस प्रकार के बीमा क्लेम को settle करने के लिए,  क्लेम एक approved surveyor को नियुक्त करना Mandatory होता है, एप्रूवड सर्वेयर की सर्वे रिपोर्ट के आधार पर बीमा कंपनी को क्लेम सैटलमैट का निर्णय लेना होता है। हालंकि यह सर्वे रिपोर्ट की recommendation बीमा कंपनी या बीमाधारक पर binding नहीं होती है। लेकिन फिर भी एप्रूवड सर्वेयर की सर्वे रिपोर्ट के न मानने के लिए ठोस आधार होने चाहिए। एप्रूवड सर्वेयर एक 3rd party legal entity होता है। एप्रूवड सर्वेयर को नियुक्त करने के लिए एक तैय समय सीमा होती है तथा एप्रूवड सर्वेयर के लिए सर्वेयर रेगूलेशन 2015-20 मे duties and responsibilities, code of conduct तैय होता है।
लेकिन आपके share किये गये message मे एप्रूवड सर्वेयर के appointment व उसकी सर्वे रिपोर्ट का कोई जिक्र नही है।


2, 
आमतौर पर ये प्रकार के forensic expert बीमा कंपनी फेवर मे रिपोर्ट देते है। वैसे ये प्रकार के forensic expert  बीमा कानून के तहत क्लेम admissibility पर recommendation या assessment करने के लिए कोई प्रमाणिक entity नहीं होते है और न ही इनकी रिपोर्ट कोई प्रमाणिक रिपोर्ट होती है।
आमतौर पर ये बिना किसी scientific तार्किक आधार के, एक दिशा मे फायदा पहुंचाने के दिशा मे कार्य करते है।

भारतीय कानून मे इस प्रकार के forensic expert की आवश्यकता को Evidence act के तहत, अपराध विषय मे, कुछ विषय मामले मे, सबूत आधार के लिए दी हुई है।

जैसे आपने बताया कि आपको सीधे forensic expert का अपने appointment के बारे मे फोन करके बताया था, लेकिन सच्चाई यह है कि बीमा कंपनी ने आपको इस investigation agency के appointment के बारे मे जानकारी नही दी, जबकि यह जिम्मेदारी बीमा कंपनी की थी। आपकी बीमा पॉलिसी बीमा कंपनी के साथ एक contract है और यह forensic expert एक 3rd party.

हमारे देश मे हर व्यक्ति को right to privacy का fundamental right है, अतः कोई भी जबरन किसी का फोन या उसके google location को चैक नहीं कर सकता है। वैसे भी आपके फोन contact का हिस्सा नहीं है।

3,
बाहर मार्केट से accessories लगाना न तो बीमा पॉलिसी अनुबंध के अनुसार न ही देश के कानून के अनुसार मना है। यदि ये accessories गलत तरीके से, खतरनाक तरीके से लगायी है तो matter करता है, लेकिन इसे साबित करना होता है, ऐसे ही बिना किसी सबूत आधार के एकतरफा सोच से कहने से काम नही चलता।

4, यह गाड़ी मे आग लगने के बहुत से संभावित कारण है, लेकिन actual आग का कारण, या origin of fire कहना बहुत मुश्किल है, या कहिये कि संभव नही है। लेकिन यह जरूर है कि गाड़ी को नुकसान का कारण fire है, proximate cause fire है। fire बीमा पॉलिसी के तहत कवरेज peril है।


Evidence act के तहत

comments.text:
Bro this is real India ..... 
Companies here are working solely for their profit motives...everyone knows that paying 15k premium to insurance company can't make them pay 14 lakhs to. Customer....they will go bankrupt....moreover as far as your case is concerned...since idv of the vehicle was around 4.5 lakhs or so....even if they pass the claim....it won't help either....one more culprit here is the skoda itself....what they estimated you is so costly lol that you can buy a 20 model ocatvia rs (DL no.) For that  price point easily....here one has to understand the price-parity of insurance value vs real world value of the car....on solution part...since its already a old vehicle,  its recommended to rebuild it as per your taste ...you may start loving your car once again....be it brotomotiv or any good garage...today we have options....depending upon insurance co. On old car in India is now itself a joke since the Govt itself is breaking down the value of the Assets of public (cars) due to some foolish decisions...

Since a Skoda/VW lover, sorry to see your car in this dismay 😑
But it could be anything again if you still love it...❤

comments.text:
This is not just ICICI Lombard, every single insurance company does that, this is a reality of India's insurance market, there is no third-party verification available.
There is no process to challenge, investigation officer or even to know what he will put in the report. Don't single out a company, they're all the same.
THE SAME STORY IS WITH LIFE INSURANCE AS WELL, SAME WITH MEDICAL INSURANCE. LITERALLY ONE HAS TO JUMP HOOPS TO GET THEIR RIGHT.

comments.text:
Disappointing Claim Settlement Experience with ICICI Lombard Insurance

I recently had a claim settlement experience with ICICI Lombard Insurance that left a sour taste. Despite having a valid claim, the process was marred by delays, lack of transparency, and poor communication.

The claim processing took an inordinate amount of time, with multiple follow-ups and unfulfilled promises. The documentation process was cumbersome, and the team seemed unresponsive to our queries.

What's concerning is the apparent lack of emphasis on customer satisfaction during the claim settlement process. As a policyholder, one expects a smoother experience, especially during an already stressful time.

Rating: 0/5 stars

Recommendation: ICICI Lombard Insurance needs to revamp its claim settlement procedure to prioritize policyholder satisfaction and transparency.
